title: sparc-halo-shell-reality: Statistical organization of localized residual structure in SPARC rotation curves (Paper II companion)
description:
Companion software, data, and manuscript source for Paper II of the halo_shells research series. Paper II characterizes the per-shell-level organization of the localized residual structures identified in Paper I, and consolidates artifact-channel robustness tests across stellar mass-to-light perturbations, distance perturbations, inclination perturbations (including edge-on reflection treatment), an anti-warp clean subsample, two backbone-family controls (Einasto and generalized NFW), and a backbone-shift test.

Contents include: the production fitter scripts (canonical, parallel nulls, perturbations, gNFW), the per-galaxy and per-shell CSV outputs for the 102-galaxy SPARC T=2-9 sample, the validation and provenance documents, and the manuscript source (markdown). For the Burkert-backbone canonical pipeline, see Paper I's repository (sparc-halo-shells; Zenodo concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20072882).
notes: Paper II of the halo_shells research series. Paper I is archived separately under sparc-halo-shells (concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20072882).
